      intro g ⟨hg, hne'⟩
      by_contra hfg
      have : Disjoint V(G, f) V(G, g) := hM.disjoint hf hg hfg
      obtain ⟨v, hv1, hv2⟩ := Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hne
      obtain ⟨w, hw1, hw2⟩ := Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hne'
      have hve : V(G, e) ⊆ V(G, M') := fun x hx => ⟨e, he, hx⟩
      have hvM : V(G, e) ⊆ V(G, M) := hve.trans h2
      have : v ∈ V(G, f) ∧ w ∈ V(G, g) := ⟨hv2, hw2⟩
      have heq : v = w := by
        have hsub : V(G, e).Subsingleton := by
          intro a ha b hb
          have ha' : a ∈ V(G, M) := hvM ha
          have hb' : b ∈ V(G, M) := hvM hb
          obtain ⟨fa, hfa, hva⟩ := ha'
          obtain ⟨fb, hfb, hvb⟩ := hb'
          by_contra hab
          have hdis_e : ¬Disjoint V(G, e) V(G, e) := by simp [Set.disjoint_iff, ha, hb, hab]
          exact hdis_e (Set.disjoint_self.mpr (by simp))
        exact hsub hv1 hw1
      subst heq
      exact this.1.elim (this.2.elim (Set.disjoint_iff.mp ‹Disjoint V(G, f) V(G, g)›))
    choose g hg using h4
    have hinj : M'.InjOn (fun e => (hg e).choose) := by
      intro e he f hf heq
      have hge := (hg e).choose_spec
      have hgf := (hg f).choose_spec

      have hgfp := hgf.1

      have hdis : Disjoint V(G, e) V(G, f) := hM'.disjoint he hf hne
      have hne1 : V(G, e) ∩ V(G, (hg e).choose) ≠ ∅ := hgep.2
      have hne2 : V(G, f) ∩ V(G, (hg f).choose) ≠ ∅ := hgfp.2
      rw [heq] at hne1
      obtain ⟨v, hv1, hv2⟩ := Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hne1
      obtain ⟨w, hw1, hw2⟩ := Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hne2
      exact Set.disjoint_iff.mp hdis hv1 hw1 rfl ▸ (hv2.elim (hw2.elim (Set.disjoint_iff.mp (hM.disjoint hgep.1 (heq ▸ hgfp.1) (fun h => hne (by

        have := hgf.2 (hg e).choose ⟨heq.symm ▸ hgep.1, heq.symm ▸ hgep.2⟩
        simp_all)))))
    exact encard_le_encard_of_injOn (fun e he => ((hg e).choose_spec.1).1) hinj

      obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := hne
      have hv' : v ∈ V(G, M) := h2 (vertexSet_edgeSet_of_mem he hv)
      obtain ⟨f, hf, hvf⟩ := hv'
      exact ⟨f, hf, Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mp ⟨v, hv, hvf⟩⟩
    calc M'.encard ≤ M.encard := by
      refine encard_le_of_injOn (fun e => Classical.choose (h3 e (by assumption))) ?_ ?_
      · intro e he
        exact (Classical.choose_spec (h3 e he)).1
      · intro e he f hf heq
        by_contra hne
        have he_spec := Classical.choose_spec (h3 e he)
        have hf_spec := Classical.choose_spec (h3 f hf)
        have hdisj : Disjoint V(G, e) V(G, f) := hM'.disjoint he hf hne
        rw [← heq] at hf_spec
        have hne1 : V(G, e) ∩ V(G, Classical.choose (h3 e he)) ≠ ∅ := he_spec.2
        have hne2 : V(G, f) ∩ V(G, Classical.choose (h3 e he)) ≠ ∅ := hf_spec.2
        obtain ⟨v, hve, hvc⟩ := Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hne1
        obtain ⟨w, hwf, hwc⟩ := Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hne2
        have : v = w := by
          have hsub := hM.subsingleton_inc v
          have hvinc : Classical.choose (h3 e he) ∈ M ∩ E(G, v) := ⟨he_spec.1, v, hvc⟩
          have hwinc : Classical.choose (h3 e he) ∈ M ∩ E(G, w) := ⟨he_spec.1, w, hwc⟩
          have hvsub := hM.subsingleton_inc w
          by_contra hvw
          have hdisj' : Disjoint V(G, Classical.choose (h3 e he)) V(G, Classical.choose (h3 e he)) := by
            simp only [Set.disjoint_self, Set.bot_eq_empty]
            intro x hx
            exact (hM.subsingleton_inc x ⟨he_spec.1, x, hx⟩ ⟨he_spec.1, x, hx⟩).symm ▸ hx
          simp at hdisj'
          exact vertexSet_edge_nonempty (hM.subset he_spec.1) hdisj'
        rw [this] at hve
        exact hdisj.le_bot ⟨hve, hwf⟩
